export_metadata.description: Predictions extracted from a previous ChatGPT conversation.
notes: Actual results were mentioned later in the conversation for some matches, but are intentionally not populated because this export is configured as predicted-history only.
Probabilities written as percentages in the conversation were converted to decimals.
No new predictions or recalculations were generated; only values explicitly present in the conversation were extracted.
Some early model_v1 forecasts did not include the later-required top 5 scorelines overall; those arrays are left empty with extraction_notes.
For matches later reformatted with reversed team order, both versions are preserved as separate prediction_version entries.

predictions.venue: San Francisco Bay Area Stadium / Levi's Stadium, Santa Clara

model_v1.summary: Switzerland was projected as the clear favorite, with mean simulated score Qatar 0.77 x 1.72 Switzerland.
extraction_notes: Only four scorelines clearly belonging to the most likely outcome were available in the conversation; conditional probabilities were not provided.

predictions.qualitative_summary: Modelo v1 apontou vitória da Suíça; placar mais provável 0-1, alternativa 0-2.

source_trace.nearby_assistant_response_summary: Assistant reported a 1000-game Monte Carlo simulation with Switzerland win probability of 59.8%.

predictions.venue: New York New Jersey Stadium / MetLife Stadium, East Rutherford

model_v1.summary: Brazil had the highest aggregate outcome probability, but the individual modal score was 1-1; final recommended score was Brazil 2-1 Morocco.

predictions.qualitative_summary: Modelo v1 favoreceu Brasil, mas com alerta de empate modal.

source_trace.conversation_turn_reference: early World Cup predictions and later formatted answer
source_trace.nearby_user_prompt: Brasil x Marrocos do jeito que pedi
source_trace.nearby_assistant_response_summary: Assistant repeated the earlier simulation and emphasized Brazil win as most likely aggregate outcome while 1-1 was the modal scoreline.

model_v1.summary: Scotland was projected as favorite, with the model recommending Haiti 1-2 Scotland despite 0-1 being the modal general score.
extraction_notes: Top overall scorelines were not separately listed in the conversation.

predictions.qualitative_summary: Escócia favorita; Haiti com chance relevante de segurar empate, mas outcome mais provável era vitória escocesa.

source_trace.nearby_assistant_response_summary: Assistant used model v1 and reported Scotland win probability of 55.2%.

model_v1.summary: Germany was projected as a very strong favorite; recommended score was 3-0 despite 2-0 being the modal score.
extraction_notes: Top overall scorelines were not separately listed in the conversation.

predictions.qualitative_summary: Favoritismo forte da Alemanha; clima não foi considerado decisivo.

source_trace.nearby_assistant_response_summary: Assistant reported Germany win probability of 85.7% and recommended 3-0.

model_v1.summary: Netherlands was projected as moderate favorite over Japan, with 1-0 as modal score and 2-1 as recommended score.
extraction_notes: Top overall scorelines were not separately listed in the conversation.

predictions.qualitative_summary: Países Baixos favoritos, mas Japão avaliado como adversário organizado e competitivo.

source_trace.nearby_assistant_response_summary: Assistant reported Netherlands win probability of 54.1%.

model_v1.summary: Ecuador was projected as a slight favorite, but the recommended score was 1-1 because the modal score was a draw and the edge was small.
extraction_notes: Top overall scorelines were not separately listed in the initial forecast; a later update reversed team order and added top overall scorelines.

predictions.qualitative_summary: Jogo equilibrado; Equador levemente à frente, mas empate foi a escolha recomendada.

source_trace.conversation_turn_reference: Ivory Coast and Ecuador initial forecast
source_trace.nearby_assistant_response_summary: Assistant reported Ecuador win probability of 38.9% with 1-1 as final recommendation.

model_v1.summary: Updated-format extraction with Ecuador listed first; the model still showed Ecuador as slight aggregate favorite but recommended 1-1.
extraction_notes: This was a later formatting update requested by the user; probabilities differ slightly from the initial team-order table and are preserved as a separate prediction version.

predictions.qualitative_summary: Versão atualizada incluiu top 5 geral e reforçou que o placar modal era empate.

source_trace.conversation_turn_reference: Updated format for Ecuador x Ivory Coast
source_trace.nearby_user_prompt: Já aproveite e mande para Equador x Costa do Marfim
source_trace.nearby_assistant_response_summary: Assistant added the new requirement: top scorelines within most likely outcome plus top 5 scorelines overall.

model_v1.summary: Sweden was projected as a moderate favorite; recommended score was Sweden 1-0 Tunisia.
extraction_notes: Top overall scorelines were not separately listed in the initial forecast; a later update reversed team order and added top overall scorelines.

predictions.qualitative_summary: Suécia favorita moderada; Tunísia vista como equipe defensivamente sólida.

source_trace.nearby_assistant_response_summary: Assistant reported Sweden win probability of 45.7% and recommended 1-0.

model_v1.summary: Updated-format extraction with Tunisia listed first; Sweden remained the most likely winner, but the modal overall score was 1-1.
extraction_notes: This was a later formatting update requested by the user; it is preserved separately because top overall scorelines were added and counts differ from the initial table.

predictions.qualitative_summary: Suécia ainda era favorita agregada, mas empate 1-1 virou placar modal geral.

source_trace.conversation_turn_reference: Updated format for Tunisia x Sweden
source_trace.nearby_user_prompt: Já aproveite e mande para Tunísia X Suécia
source_trace.nearby_assistant_response_summary: Assistant added top 5 overall scorelines and kept Sweden as most likely outcome.

model_v1.summary: Spain was projected as a very strong favorite; the model recommended 3-0 while 2-0 was modal.

predictions.qualitative_summary: Modelo v1 superestimou superioridade ofensiva da favorita, fato discutido posteriormente na recalibração.

source_trace.nearby_user_prompt: Agora quero o resultado das partidas de amanhã (15/06)
source_trace.nearby_assistant_response_summary: Assistant listed Spain x Cape Verde as one of four games and gave Spain win probability of 83.7%.

model_v1.summary: Belgium was a slight aggregate favorite, but 1-1 was the modal overall score; recommended score was 2-1 Belgium.

predictions.qualitative_summary: Jogo com risco real de empate; posteriormente foi apontado como a previsão mais próxima da rodada.

source_trace.nearby_user_prompt: Agora quero o resultado das partidas de amanhã (15/06)
source_trace.nearby_assistant_response_summary: Assistant gave Belgium win probability of 49.5%, draw 24.7%, Egypt win 25.8%.

model_v1.summary: Uruguay was projected as clear favorite; recommended and modal score was Saudi Arabia 0-2 Uruguay.

predictions.qualitative_summary: Uruguai favorito, com clima quente/úmido considerado fator de redução de ritmo.

source_trace.nearby_user_prompt: Agora quero o resultado das partidas de amanhã (15/06)
source_trace.nearby_assistant_response_summary: Assistant gave Uruguay win probability of 61.4%.

model_v1.summary: Iran was projected as favorite, with 1-0 as modal and recommended score.

predictions.qualitative_summary: Irã favorito; modelo indicou vitória curta e risco de empate.

source_trace.nearby_user_prompt: Agora quero o resultado das partidas de amanhã (15/06)
source_trace.nearby_assistant_response_summary: Assistant gave Iran win probability of 57.1%.

strategic_context.first_goal_assumption: If France scores first, 2-0 or 2-1 scenarios rise; if Senegal holds 0-0 late, draw probability increases.
strategic_context.expected_game_script: France has the stronger aggregate outcome, but Senegal can make the match physically intense and compact; a 1-1 modal score reflects high draw risk.

model_v2.summary: Model v2 made France the most likely winner, but with a high draw probability and 1-1 as modal overall score.

predictions.qualitative_summary: França favorita, mas Senegal tem perfil para travar o jogo.

source_trace.nearby_user_prompt: Ótimo. Agora faça as previsões para os jogos de hoje então por favor
source_trace.nearby_assistant_response_summary: Assistant applied model v2 and gave France win probability of 46.3%.

strategic_context.first_goal_assumption: Norway scoring first increases 0-2/0-3 scenarios; a long 0-0 increases draw mass.
strategic_context.expected_game_script: Norway is favored through attacking quality, but Iraq is expected to defend compactly because a draw would be strategically valuable.

model_v2.summary: Model v2 made Norway the most likely winner, but 0-1 and 1-1 were tied as modal general scorelines.

predictions.qualitative_summary: Noruega favorita; Iraque com incentivo claro para fechar o jogo.

source_trace.nearby_user_prompt: Ótimo. Agora faça as previsões para os jogos de hoje então por favor
source_trace.nearby_assistant_response_summary: Assistant gave Norway win probability of 55.8%.

strategic_context.first_goal_assumption: Argentina scoring first increases 2-0 and 2-1 paths; if Algeria survives early pressure, 1-1 becomes the modal score.
strategic_context.expected_game_script: Argentina favored as defending champion, but Algeria expected to avoid early exposure and use transition attacks.

model_v2.summary: Model v2 made Argentina the most likely winner while 1-1 was the most frequent individual scoreline.

predictions.qualitative_summary: Argentina favorita, mas empate 1-1 muito vivo no modelo recalibrado.

source_trace.nearby_user_prompt: Ótimo. Agora faça as previsões para os jogos de hoje então por favor
source_trace.nearby_assistant_response_summary: Assistant gave Argentina win probability of 47.9%.

extraction_notes: The match occurs on 2026-06-17 UTC but was presented as part of the 2026-06-16 Brazil-time slate.

predictions.venue: San Francisco Bay Area Stadium / Levi's Stadium, Santa Clara

strategic_context.first_goal_assumption: If Austria scores early, 2-0 or 3-0 scenarios rise; if Jordan holds the match at 0-0 for long, draw probability rises.
strategic_context.expected_game_script: Austria has the stronger structure, while Jordan is expected to defend low and counterattack.

model_v2.summary: Model v2 projected Austria as favorite, with 1-0 as both modal and recommended score.

predictions.qualitative_summary: Áustria favorita, mas Jordânia com incentivo para travar e buscar empate.

source_trace.nearby_assistant_response_summary: Assistant gave Austria win probability of 56.5%.
